h0a9a346dg2ee4g4d6dg913dg3ab5bb4641a5: On to playing for coppers on the corners of Baldur's Gate. I can hardly stand the glamour.
h3c696a13g3484g4c06g8eb5g32c291cef204: I'm going to have to write a song about you now, aren't I?
h2f93cf48g3f48g4585g82c3g2fbd0d717eaf: But, truly... thank you. It's nice to be done with the sad songs, for a time.
h9325a3e2gcb1eg43fcg802eg6b0da3f12794: Get to the walls, beat the goblins back. Trust me - it's an easier job than this.

h4da35a9fgfac4g4603g8a1eg737acc960fb4: Good to see you again. How are you holding up?

h83ae258cg3c32g48ddg89c9g47615efda3c1: Live through the day and you might even get to hear the finished thing.
h73b54c5fg5718g46a3g8989g7c58dd7403ed: What are you doing hiding down here?

h9741187bg594dg4d14ga610g105d1823e7d6: But making enough noise to keep this little mob distracted? That I can help with.

h7b57af29g1fc6g4f5dga8a9g43af722e55ec: Now's a time for cheerful lies, as my master would say.
h76e0b192g8b80g41b1gbd8fg119854c28947: The details of your story seem a little fuzzy.
hbe95ee1cg8a3dg4215gad67gd6cdcbeb179c: As a halfling's hoof, I should hope.
h87ba048bg8e8cg47d9gb361g884b9cde9b35: If today's to be something worth singing about - get up there and make sure it's a happy song.
hee785ba4g751eg4b12ga0e4ge9def8102be8: Do you know any stories about tiefling heroes?
h5b6e4cd3g0a08g4b77g99abgaf9c35487c70: Huh. Plenty with tiefling villains... but not so many heroes, no.
h95441545g48f3g4f8agaceagb7140b79bffb: I suppose you'll just have to get up there and change that. No pressure, kin.
hd50bbe75g2d60g43dcga54cgf0d0c1089c16: I suppose you'll just have to get up there and change that. No pressure, kin.
hb82a0e2eg2aa5g447bgab1cgbc4f17c014ea: I could always scare them off. Maybe roar a little, for good measure?
he1c7cf22g6f00g40a8g9831g004979d2e6cf: Hah! I'd pay good money to see you try. They're cute but deadly. Like the realms' most terrifying bunny rabbits.
